title: Topic
description: A single teachable unit within a subject

id.description: Unique topic ID within syllabus, e.g. SJ1-05, SJ2-03

official_ref.description: Official chapter/section code from the source curriculum document (e.g., Chapter 1, Bab 1)

name.description: Topic name in the primary language of the curriculum

language.description: BCP 47 language code for primary content language (e.g., ms, en)

difficulty.description: Overall difficulty level of the topic relative to the grade

theme.description: Overarching curriculum theme (Tema) this topic belongs to, e.g. 'Sejarah Kita dan Dunia'

topic_focus.description: Key content focus areas listed in the DSKP topic overview (Fokus) — the main sub-themes or concepts to be taught

topic_empathy.description: Values, attitudes and dispositions students should develop through this topic (Empati), as listed in the DSKP topic overview

citizenship_elements.description: Elemen Kewarganegaraan dan Nilai Sivik (K-elements) embedded in this topic. These must be delivered through lesson planning (RPH) and cannot be taught as standalone objectives.

id.description: K-element ID matching the DSKP Standard Pembelajaran notation, e.g. K1.1.8, K2.1.7

text.description: Full text of the Kewarganegaraan element in the primary curriculum language

text_en.description: English translation of the Kewarganegaraan element

content_standard_id.description: Reference to the content standard (Standard Kandungan) this K-element falls under

historical_thinking_skills.description: Kemahiran Pemikiran Sejarah (KPS) skills developed in this topic. Specific to History as a discipline.

content_standards.description: Official content standards (Standard Kandungan) from the curriculum document that this topic addresses

id.description: Content standard ID in major.minor format matching the official curriculum document (e.g., 1.1, 2.3)

text.description: Content standard text in the primary language of the curriculum

text_en.description: English translation of the content standard

learning_objectives.description: Specific, measurable learning objectives (Standard Pembelajaran) that students should achieve

id.description: Learning objective ID — either LOnn format (e.g., LO01) or major.minor.seq format (e.g., 1.1.1)

text.description: Learning objective text in the primary language of the curriculum

text_en.description: English translation of the learning objective text

bloom.description: Bloom's taxonomy level that this objective targets

content_standard_id.description: Reference to a content standard ID within this topic

is_citizenship_elements.description: If true, this objective carries the Kewarganegaraan dan Nilai Sivik (K) marker from the DSKP. It must be embedded in RPH lesson planning and must not be taught as a standalone objective.

prerequisites.description: Topic IDs that should be mastered before or alongside this topic

required.description: Topic IDs that must be completed before starting this topic

recommended.description: Topic IDs that are helpful but not strictly required

teaching.description: Pedagogical guidance for teaching this topic effectively

sequence.description: Ordered list of sub-topic teaching steps or phases for lesson delivery

common_misconceptions.description: Known student misconceptions and how to address them

misconception.description: A common incorrect belief or error students make on this topic

remediation.description: Teaching strategy or explanation to correct the misconception

engagement_hooks.description: Real-world connections or interesting facts to motivate student engagement

bloom_levels.description: Bloom's taxonomy levels covered across all learning objectives in this topic

mastery.description: Criteria for determining when a student has mastered this topic

minimum_score.description: Minimum score (0-1) a student must achieve to be considered proficient

assessment_count.description: Number of assessment questions to use when testing mastery

spaced_repetition.description: Parameters for spaced repetition review scheduling

initial_interval_days.description: Number of days before the first review after initial mastery

multiplier.description: Factor by which the review interval grows after each successful review

cross_curriculum.description: Links to equivalent or related topics in other syllabi via shared concepts

concept_id.description: ID of the shared concept that bridges the two topics

syllabus_id.description: Syllabus ID of the linked topic

topic_id.description: Topic ID in the other syllabus that covers the same concept

id.description: Performance standard ID, typically TPn format (e.g., TP1, TP6)

text.description: Performance standard text in the primary language

text_en.description: English translation of the performance standard text

descriptor.description: Detailed descriptor of what the student can do at this level, in primary language

descriptor_en.description: English translation of the detailed descriptor

tier.description: Whether this topic is part of the core syllabus or the extended/elective syllabus

ai_teaching_notes.description: Relative path to .teaching.md file containing detailed AI tutoring guidance

examples_file.description: Relative path to .examples.yaml file containing worked examples

assessments_file.description: Relative path to .assessments.yaml file containing assessment questions

provenance.description: How this content was created: human, ai-assisted, ai-generated, or ai-observed

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the content was generated

engagement_hooks.description: Hooks to engage students (can appear at root or under teaching)

sync_checked.description: If true, explicitly confirms that logic-heavy fields (prerequisites, mastery) in this file match the Root EN file.
